project_type: Python multi-agent investment analysis system with FastAPI dashboard and Click CLI
test_framework: pytest with tests/ directory, currently 301 tests passing
verification_instructions: Run pytest tests/ and confirm all tests pass including new ones
setup_instructions: pip install -e '.[dev]' - already installed in this sandbox
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET mode, Python 3.11 default, all deps already installed
contribution_requirements: All code must pass pytest. Follow existing patterns for agents/tests.
key_patterns: Persona agents in src/augur/personas/*.py inherit BaseAgent. Registry in src/augur/registry.py. Coordinator handles consensus with weights. CLI uses Click. Dashboard uses FastAPI+Jinja2. Tests in tests/test_iteration*.py pattern.
directory_structure: src/augur/ = core library, dashboard/ = FastAPI web UI, tests/ = pytest tests, scanner/ = legacy loader, personas/ = custom YAML personas, config/ = default config
